runs.output_code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields
} from "elements";
import {
  registrationSchema,
  RegistrationFormValues,
  registrationInitialValues
} from "@/registration/types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "Utente" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Amministratore" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributore" }
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Giornaliero" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Settimanale" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Mensile" }
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => values
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="registrationInitialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >

    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Almeno 3 caratteri"
        type="text"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="nome@esempio.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Ruolo"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Other Info (conditional) -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === "contributor""
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Descrizione del contributo"
        placeholder="Spiega cosa ti puoi offrire"
        type="text"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Iscriviti alla newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency (conditional) -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequenza"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio (optional) -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Biografia"
        placeholder="Scrivi qualcosa di te..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Registrati
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

// --- types/index.ts ---
import { z } from 'zod';

export const registrationSchema = z.object({
  username: z.string().min(3, "Username: almeno 3 caratteri"),
  email: z.string().email("Email non valida").min(1, "Email obbligatoria"),
  role: z.enum(["user", "admin", "contributor"]),
  otherInfo: z.string().optional(),
  newsletter: z.boolean().optional(),
  frequency: z.enum(["daily", "weekly", "monthly"]).optional(),
  bio: z.string().optional(),
}).superRefine((data, ctx) => {
  // otherInfo required when role is "contributor"
  if (data.role === "contributor" && !data.otherInfo) {
    ctx.addIssue({
      code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom,
      message: "Descrivi il tuo contributo",
      path: ["otherInfo"],
    });
  }

  // frequency required when newsletter is true
  if (data.newsletter && !data.frequency) {
    ctx.addIssue({
      code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom,
      message: "Seleziona una frequenza",
      path: ["frequency"],
    });
  }
});

export type RegistrationFormValues = z.infer<typeof registrationSchema>;

// Initial values: all optional fields get a safe default (empty string or false/undefined)
export const registrationInitialValues: RegistrationFormValues = {
  username: "",
  email: "",
  role: "user",
  otherInfo: "",
  newsletter: false,
  frequency: undefined,
  bio: "",
};

<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields
} from "elements";
import {
  registrationSchema,
  RegistrationFormValues,
  registrationInitialValues
} from "@/registration/types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "Utente" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Amministratore" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributore" }
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Giornaliero" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Settimanale" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Mensile" }
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => values
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="registrationInitialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >

    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Almeno 3 caratteri"
        type="text"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="nome@esempio.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role -->

        label="Descrizione del contributo"
        placeholder="Spiega cosa ti puoi offrire"

        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter -->

        label="Iscriviti alla newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency (conditional) -->

        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequenza"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio (optional) -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Biografia"
        placeholder="Scrivi qualcosa di te..."

      />

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">

export const registrationSchema = z.object({
  username: z.string().min(3, "Username: almeno 3 caratteri"),

  role: z.enum(["user", "admin", "contributor"]),
  otherInfo: z.string().optional(),
  newsletter: z.boolean().optional(),
  frequency: z.enum(["daily", "weekly", "monthly"]).optional(),
  bio: z.string().optional(),
})
.superRefine((data, ctx) => {
  // otherInfo is required when role is "contributor"

    ctx.addIssue({
      code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom,
      message: "Descrivi il tuo contributo",
      path: ["otherInfo"],
    });
  }

  // frequency is required when newsletter is true
  if (data.newsletter && !data.frequency) {

      code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom,
      message: "Seleziona una frequenza",

    });
  }

export type RegistrationFormValues = z.infer<typeof registrationSchema>;

export const registrationInitialValues: RegistrationFormValues = {
  username: "",
  email: "",
  role: "user",

<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields
} from "elements";
import {
  registrationSchema,
  RegistrationFormValues,
  registrationInitialValues
} from "@/registration/types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "Utente" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Amministratore" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributore" }
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Giornaliero" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Settimanale" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Mensile" }
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => values
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="registrationInitialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >

    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Almeno 3 caratteri"
        type="text"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="nome@esempio.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Ruolo"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Other Info (conditional) -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === "contributor""
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Descrizione del contributo"
        placeholder="Spiega cosa ti puoi offrire"
        type="text"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Iscriviti alla newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency (conditional) -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequenza"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio (optional) -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Biografia"
        placeholder="Scrivi qualcosa di te..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Registrati
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

  newsletter: z.boolean().optional(),

  // otherInfo is required when role is "contributor"
  if (data.role === "contributor" && !data.otherInfo) {

      code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom,
      message: "Descrivi il tuo contributo",

    });
  }

  // frequency is required when newsletter is true
  if (data.newsletter && !data.frequency) {
    ctx.addIssue({
      code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom,

    });
  }

// Initial values: all optional fields get a safe default (empty string or false/undefined)
export const registrationInitialValues: RegistrationFormValues = {
